{
  "claims": [
    "Abandoned shopping carts create safety hazards, block sidewalks, pollute creeks, and incur costs for cities.",
    "Senate Bill 753 will modernize state law to help local governments address abandoned shopping cart issues more efficiently.",
    "The bill allows cities to return abandoned shopping carts directly to retailers without a three-day waiting period.",
    "Cities can recover costs by billing retailers for retrieval services under the provisions of Senate Bill 753.",
    "Current state law has been ineffective at preventing shopping cart abandonment and incentivizing proper recovery."
  ]
